refund: If email contains refund, return, reimbursement, or charged, classify as refund.
complaint: If email contains unacceptable, terrible, angry, broken, or frustrated, classify as complaint.
query: If email asks for information, policy, status, or how-to, classify as query.

reply_templates.refund: Hello, we are sorry for the issue. We will help process your refund promptly. Regards, Support Team.
reply_templates.complaint: Hello, we are sorry for your experience. We take this seriously and will resolve it quickly. Regards, Support Team.
reply_templates.query: Hello, thank you for your question. We are happy to help and will provide the requested information. Regards, Support Team.

reasoning: Fallback strategy using conservative keyword classification, structured templates, and safe escalation defaults.
